query: Set up a lightweight AGENTS.md and sensible docs structure for this repository.
Audit our agent instructions for stale commands and duplicated documentation.
This AGENTS.md has grown to five pages. Keep the important rules and route the rest.
Clean up stale handoffs and overlapping agent-facing repository guidance without losing durable rules.
Do the monthly maintenance pass on AGENTS.md, README, and docs.
README and CI disagree about how tests run; fix the agent-facing guidance without guessing.
Audit our active AGENTS.override.md and fallback instructions without flattening their scopes.
Codex init created a generic AGENTS.md; trim it to durable actionable guidance.
Our coding agent keeps inventing setup commands and copying folder descriptions into AGENTS.md. Rework the repo guidance from evidence without touching product docs.
After a monorepo restructure, reconcile root and nested agent instructions and keep each rule at the right scope.
Write API documentation for the new payments endpoint.
Update the README screenshots and feature description for the new dashboard.
Review the AGENTS.md changes in this pull request for correctness and missing tests, but do not rewrite or reorganize repository guidance.
Summarize the AGENTS.md and docs changes since v1.4.0 for release notes without modifying repository instructions.
Draft an architecture decision record proposing how future coding-agent guidance should be organized; do not inspect or change current instruction files.
Fix broken links in our public product documentation.
Clean up outdated API reference pages and rewrite the public user guide.
Run the built-in Codex /init command in this repository.
Translate AGENTS.md to Korean and improve its grammar without changing any rules or routing.
Explain how Codex loads root and nested AGENTS.md files; do not inspect or change this repository.
Refresh the active AGENTS.md after package metadata and CI changed the supported test command.
Route current root and nested agent instructions after splitting a monorepo package.
Create a generic AGENTS.md review checklist for future pull requests without inspecting or changing this repository.
Write a comparison guide explaining AGENTS.md versus CLAUDE.md for our handbook; do not audit or modify current repository instructions.
